case_title: BONNIE LUDD VS. OFFICER MONA CLAB ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLAB, OFFICER MONA SF POLICE DEPARTMENT, TENDERLOIN STATION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUDD, BONNIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUDD, BONNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CLAB, OFFICER MONA SF POLICE DEPARTMENT, TENDERLOIN STATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LUDD, BONNIE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY LUDD, BONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT CLAB, OFFICER MONA SF POLICE DEPARTMENT, TENDERLOIN STATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE: IFP) SERVED DEC-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLAB, OFFICER MONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BONNIE LUDD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS OFFICER MONA CLAB AND SAN FRANCISCO POLCIE DEPARTMENT TENDERLOIN STATION ARE PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. NOTICE WAIVED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLCIE DEPARTMENT TENDERLOIN STATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
